headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Biogen, Lowers Price Target to $221
summary: Mizuho  analyst Salim Syed   maintains Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $236 to $221.

headline: 3 Overrated  Stocks Walking a Fine Line
summary: The stocks featured in this article have all approached their 52-week highs. When these price levels hit, it typically signals strong business execution, positive market sentiment, or significant industry tailwinds.
